object_a.label: ceiling light
object_a.description: three pendant lights hanging above the island
object_a.long_form_open_description: A cluster of decorative pendant lamps (three fixtures) suspended over the island; glass or frosted shades with metal hardware, warm-toned light; fixtures hang from the ceiling at a moderate drop height providing task lighting for the island.

object_b.label: ceiling light
